zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Ralph Shirley於1391年4月23日出生在英國德比夏爾阿希布恩時，他的父親Hugh Shirley30歲，母親Beatrice Braose26歲。他於1405年之前與Joan Basset在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1420年被列為sheriff of derbyshire 。他去世於大約1443年在法國享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Ralph Shirley于1391年4月23日出生在英国德比夏爾阿希布恩时，他的父亲Hugh Shirley30岁，母亲Beatrice Braose26岁。他于1405年之前与Joan Basset在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1420年被列为sheriff of derbyshire 。他去世于大约1443年在法国享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: Shirley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the places so named, such as Shirley (Warwickshire), Shirley in Millbrook (Hampshire), Shirley (Surrey), Shirley in Owston (Yorkshire), and Shirley (Derbyshire). The placenames probably derive from Old English scīr ‘bright’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’, though some may have scīr ‘district, shire’ as the initial element if they lie on a boundary; for example, the Warwickshire place lies on the Warwickshire-Worcestershire boundary. The name Shirley first appears in Ireland in the late 17th century, following the granting of lands to a Shirley family in the barony of Farney, Monaghan.

History: William Shirley (1694–1771) was born in Sussex, England, and came to MA in 1731. He rose in the colonial service, was appointed governor in 1741, and was responsible for the British capture of the French fortress of Louisbourg, Cape Breton Island, in 1745.

variants.name: Sherley
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Shirley  .
Americanized form of Norwegian Sjøli or Sjølie: habitational name from a farmstead named with sjø ‘sea, lake’ + li ‘hillside’.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Ralph Shirley was born on 23 April 1391, in Ashbourne, Derbyshire, England, his father, Hugh Shirley, was 30 and his mother, Beatrice Braose, was 26. He married Joan Basset before 1405, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. In 1420, at the age of 29, his occupation is listed as sheriff of derbyshire . He died about 1443, in France, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Ralph Shirley est né le 23 avril 1391, à Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Hugh Shirley, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Beatrice Braose, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Joan Basset avant 1405, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. En 1420, à l’âge de 29 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of derbyshire . Il est décédé environ 1443, à France, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.Of Brailsford, Derbyshire, England: Brailsford Green, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Ralph Shirley am 23. April 1391 in Ashbourne, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh Shirley 30 und seine Mutter Beatrice Braose 26. Er hat vor 1405 in England, United Kingdom Joan Basset geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. 1420, als er 29 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als sheriff of derbyshire  aufgeführt. Er starb um 1443 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Ralph Shirley è nato il il 23 aprile 1391 nel Ashbourne, Derbyshire, England, il suo padre, Hugh Shirley, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Beatrice Braose, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Joan Basset prima del 1405, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Nel 1420, all'età di 29 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of derbyshire . Morì circa 1443, nel Francia, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Shirleyが1391年4月23日にイギリスデルブイシュアイアアシュボウルンで生まれた時，父Hugh Shirleyは30歳，母Beatrice Braoseは26歳であった。1405年以前にイギリスイギリスでJoan Bassetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。1420年，29歳の時，職業はsheriff of derbyshire と記録されている。彼は約1443年にフランスで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Shirley(이)가 1391년 4월 23일 영국 더비실르 애스h보우른에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh Shirley(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Beatrice Braose(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1405년 이전 영국 잉글랜드에서 Joan Basset(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1420년, 29세의 나이로 그의 직업은 sheriff of derbyshire 이었다. 그는 대략 1443년 프랑스에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Ralph Shirley nasceu em 23 de abril de 1391, em Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh Shirley, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Beatrice Braose, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Basset antes 1405, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Em 1420, com 29 anos, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of derbyshire . Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1443, em França, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Ralph Shirley родился 23 апреля 1391 г. в местности ашбурн, дирбишир, Англия, его отцу по имени Hugh Shirley было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrice Braose, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Basset перед 1405 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. В 1420 году, в возрасте 29 лет,  он работал по профессии sheriff of derbyshire . Он умер около 1443 г. в местности Франция в возрасте 53 лет.

Se casó con Joan Basset antes de 1405, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. En 1420, a la edad de 29 años, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of derbyshire . Murió aproximadamente 1443, en Francia, a la edad de 53 años.
